description: Lead Create Form Fixes - BANT Drop, Revenue Mapping, Validation. Fix 3 HIGH issues: (1) BANT fields (Budget, Authority, Need, Timeline) collected in create form but silently dropped on submit - never sent to API [F3]. (2) annualRevenue mapped to estimatedValue - semantic mismatch between company annual revenue and deal estimated value [F4]. (3) Edit form uses 'as any' cast with no client-side Zod validation - no inline field errors [F9]. Fix: Send BANT to API (add to createLeadSchema if needed), map annualRevenue correctly, add Zod resolver to edit form, remove as any.

primary_kpi.actual: budget/authority/need/timeline + annualRevenue are first-class Lead columns; create->getById round-trips them as distinct fields (router + repo + mapper tests)

kpi_2.actual: edit form F9 cast removed; buildLeadUpdatePayload returns the typed tRPC input; grep of lead form source = 0 'as any'

test_coverage.actual: new code covered across domain/validators/application/adapters/api/web suites; diff-coverage >=80% (mappers excluded per #382)

notes: Comprehensive flow analysis findings: F3,F4,F9. F3 resolved by promoting BANT to first-class columns (was interim qualificationNote). F4 verified non-existent in current code (annualRevenue never mapped to estimatedValue); annualRevenue now a distinct persisted band. F9 fixed with plain-Zod-on-submit inline validation + removed cast. Codex local gate was account-quota-blocked (resets 2026-06-18) -> auto-skipped (exit 0); compensated with an adversarial backend-architect review (no real bugs).
